canteen.title: Craft a Canteen or Water Container (ThirstWasTaken — carry water as an item)

purify.title: Purify water to at least Clean tier (ThirstWasTaken purity system — avoid Dirty water debuffs)

subtitle.text: ThirstWasTaken — 20 hydration points, draining constantly. The Nether triples drain rate.

description: It drains at a constant rate.
At zero: debuffs, slowness, eventually damage.
└ Water source: refills bar (but may be impure)
or Herbal Brews (The Herbal Arts scroll, Ch04)
▸ The Nether tripling drain rate is the key design note:
You must carry purified water into the Nether.
Ch06 Nether entry without water prep is dangerous.
▶ Craft a Canteen to carry water [check]
◇ Meadow mod (Ch04) adds fresh springs with pure water.
Locate a meadow biome for reliable clean water.
